meta-description: Learn about skilled nursing care by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Skilled nursing care
excerpt: Services from licensed nurses in your own home or in a nursing home. Skilled care services are from technicians and therapists in your own home or in a nursing home.
content: Services from licensed nurses in your own home or in a nursing home. Skilled care services are from technicians and therapists in your own home or in a nursing home.
